name: Download via Encoded Command Initiated
notes: This rule triggers when a download of a PowerShell script is initiated from a programming environment type cmd or Powershell.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create, (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created
when the event matches Process Name IMATCHES '(powershell\.exe)|(cmd\.exe)' AQL filter query
when the event matches Encoded Command (custom) is not N/A

when the event matches Filters::PScmdFilter(DECODERS::BASE64DECODE("Encoded Command")) IMATCHES '(.*NewObject.*NetWebClient.*DownloadString.*ps1.*)|(.*NewObject.*NetWebClient.*DownloadFile.*ps1.*)' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Download via Encoded Command Initiated on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create, (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created
AND when the event matches Process Name IMATCHES '(powershell\.exe)|(cmd\.exe)' AQL filter query
AND when the event matches Encoded Command (custom) is not N/A

AND when the event matches Filters::PScmdFilter(DECODERS::BASE64DECODE("Encoded Command")) IMATCHES '(.*NewObject.*NetWebClient.*DownloadString.*ps1.*)|(.*NewObject.*NetWebClient.*DownloadFile.*ps1.*)' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Powershell Script download with EncodedCommand
Event description: Powershell Script download with EncodedCommand
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
